buildCommand: npm run build && mkdir -p dist/app && mv dist/index.html dist/app/index.html && mv dist/assets dist/app/assets && cp -r dist/favicon.svg dist/icons.svg dist/sharegood-logo.svg dist/sharegood-logo-v2.svg dist/sharegood-logo-backup.svg dist/app/ 2>/dev/null; cp landing.html dist/index.html
